notes: Python 1.5.20 — Hotfix for v1.5.19 regressions. (1) DSV4 garbage output ("DeepAI" / \boxed{}) fixed by restoring prestack_pat handler in generic loader so DSV4 prestacked tensors hydrate as TurboQuantSwitchLinear correctly + Metal SwitchGLU monkey-patch attaches the fast-decode kernel path. (2) Laguna 90→20 t/s regression — same root cause as DSV4, fast-decode path now triggers. (3) MiniMax thinking-leak-as-content mitigation: keep enable_thinking unset/true; template always emits <think>. (4) JANGTQ3 in_features fix propagated into bundled jang_tools (was in source but missing from v1.5.19 bundle): loader now reads canonical in_features from the pre-replacement module instead of recovering via packed_cols * vals_per_u32 (over-rounds for bits=3 / vals_per_u32=10 on in_features not divisible by 10 — e.g. 4096→4100, 7168→7170). Apple notarized + stapled. SHA-256: 633b663180ceb2b6e09c48d21fd43f55ba821ed8091f7b026c0bf63f11740f98
